name: google_drive_upload_file
description: Uploads a file to Google Drive. Supports automatic conversion of office formats (like PPTX, DOCX, XLSX) into Google Workspace formats.

name.description: The user-friendly name of the file that will show up in Drive list

file_path.description: The file path to the file to upload.

convert.description: If true, converts Office documents or CSVs into Google Docs/Slides/Sheets.

parent.description: The Google Drive folder that will be the parent of this newly uploaded file

status_update.description:
A status update to show in the UI that provides more detail on the reason why this function was called.
  
  For example, "Creating random values", "Writing the memo", "Generating videos", "Making music", etc.

file_path.description: The file path that points at the generated Google Doc.

error.description: If an error has occurred, will contain a description of the error

name: google_drive_create_folder
description: Creates a new Google Drive folder.

name.description: The user-friendly name of the file that will show up in Drive list

parent.description: The Google Drive folder that will be the parent of this newly created folder

status_update.description:
A status update to show in the UI that provides more detail on the reason why this function was called.
  
  For example, "Creating random values", "Writing the memo", "Generating videos", "Making music", etc.

folder_id.description: The Google Drive Folder ID of the newly created folder

error.description: If an error has occurred, will contain a description of the error
